◎简　　介  

　　Winner of the Audience Award of the Fort Worth Gay and Lesbian International Film Festival at Texas. From the director of GOING DOWN IN LA-LA LAND comes KISS ME, KILL ME, a contemporary film noir and thriller. Starring gay icon Gale Harold from QUEER AS FOLK, this murder mystery will keep you guessing until the very end with its different plot twists. While Dusty is confronting...
